title: Two-Phase Factor-Vine Copula Networks
text: Modern copula models use latent factors handle high-dimensional dependence. two-phase workflow fit parsimonious factor copula large reference cohort (Phase 1), update graphical model vine copula small new sample (Phase 2), testing whether update consistent prior. See factor_vine_plan.md package source literature context.

title: Two-Phase Factor-Vine Copula Networks
text: Optional dependencies (install needed):
code: library(copulaNetworks) has_factor <- requireNamespace("FactorCopula", quietly = TRUE) has_vine <- requireNamespace("VineCopula", quietly = TRUE) has_cmdstanr <- requireNamespace("cmdstanr", quietly = TRUE)

title: Two-Phase Factor-Vine Copula Networks
code: set.seed(42) d <- 12 N <- 500 n <- 30 lambda <- runif(d, 0.35, 0.75) sim_block <- function(n_obs) {   f <- rnorm(n_obs)   eps <- matrix(rnorm(n_obs * d), nrow = n_obs, ncol = d)   factor_part <- matrix(lambda, nrow = n_obs, ncol = d, byrow = TRUE) * f   x <- factor_part + sweep(eps, 2, sqrt(1 - lambda^2), `*`)   colnames(x) <- paste0("node", seq_len(d))   as.data.frame(x) } priorData <- sim_block(N) updateData <- sim_block(n) nodes <- paste0("node", 1:d) dim(priorData) #> [1] 500  12 dim(updateData) #> [1] 30 12

title: Two-Phase Factor-Vine Copula Networks
text: Phase 2 must use prior-fitted marginal transforms, re-ranking small n. Contrast re-ranking small sample (wrong copula update): Normal scores graphical update:
code: marginalSpec <- FitMarginalSpec(priorData, nodeCols = nodes) U_update <- ApplyMarginalSpec(updateData, marginalSpec) range(U_update) #> [1] 0.006986028 0.997005988 U_wrong <- UniformMarginalTransform(as.matrix(updateData)) mean(abs(U_update - U_wrong)) #> [1] 0.04511515 Z_update <- qnorm(U_update) head(Z_update[, 1:3]) #>           node1      node2      node3 #> [1,] -0.4170433 -1.0860766  0.8044144 #> [2,] -1.2999656 -0.5175240 -1.1229069 #> [3,] -2.2911267 -0.9053699 -2.2911267 #> [4,]  0.9129336 -0.3100972  0.5638528 #> [5,] -0.5405434  0.8044144 -0.4061522 #> [6,]  0.3953091  0.1002326 -1.1913074

what: Phase 1: Factor structure and prior fit
title: Two-Phase Factor-Vine Copula Networks
text: Implied correlation heatmap:
code: prior_fit <- FitFactorCopulaPrior(   priorData,   nodeCols = nodes,   nFactors = 1L,   linkingCopula = "bvn" ) CheckFactorStructure(prior_fit$impliedCor, nFactors = 1L) prior_fit$loadings if (has_factor) {   PlotCopulaCorHeatmap(     list(copulaCor = prior_fit$impliedCor, keptCols = nodes),     title = "Phase 1 implied correlation"   ) }

title: Two-Phase Factor-Vine Copula Networks
code: update_fit_both <- FitCopulaUpdate(   updateData,   priorFit = prior_fit,   method = "both",   nlambda = 20 ) if (!is.null(update_fit_both$vine)) {   update_fit_both$vine$logLik } FactorGroupsFromLoadings(prior_fit$loadings, k = 2)

title: Two-Phase Factor-Vine Copula Networks
text: Network plot:
code: update_fit <- FitCopulaUpdate(   updateData,   priorFit = prior_fit,   method = "graphical",   nlambda = 20 ) update_fit$graphical$lambdaOpt if (has_factor && !is.null(update_fit$graphical)) {   PlotCopulaNetwork(update_fit$graphical, title = "update") }

title: Two-Phase Factor-Vine Copula Networks
code: cmp <- ComparePriorToUpdate(prior_fit, update_fit) head(cmp$pcor)

title: Two-Phase Factor-Vine Copula Networks
code: gof <- TestPriorConsistency(   prior_fit,   updateData,   nRep = 200,   seed = 1 ) gof$pValue hist(gof$nullDistribution, main = "Null distribution", xlab = "pairwise tau stat") abline(v = gof$obsStat, col = "red", lwd = 2)

title: Two-Phase Factor-Vine Copula Networks
code: if (has_factor && has_cmdstanr) {   bayes_fit <- FitBayesianFactorUpdate(     prior_fit,     updateData,     chains = 2,     iter = 500,     computeBayesFactor = requireNamespace("bridgesampling", quietly = TRUE),     seed = 1   )   head(bayes_fit$summary) }

title: Two-Phase Factor-Vine Copula Networks
text: Checkpoints use SaveCheckpoint() / LoadCheckpoint() outDir set.
code: res <- RunFactorVinePipeline(   priorData = priorData,   updateData = updateData,   nodeCols = nodes,   nFactors = 1L,   phase2Method = "graphical",   testMethod = "simulation",   nRep = 100,   nlambda = 20,   seed = 1 ) res$consistencyTest$pValue

title: Two-Phase Factor-Vine Copula Networks
text: single-table stratified workflows, use RunCopulaPipeline() PrepareCopulaData() stratum specs. Use RunFactorVinePipeline() separate large prior small update cohorts.

title: Two-Phase Factor-Vine Copula Networks
text: Covariate-adjusted marginals: user supplies pre-adjusted data v1 Continuous margins FitFactorCopulaPrior() Factor-informed vine truncation uses heuristic FactorGroupsFromLoadings() Full factor-tree vines deferred

title: Stratified Nonparanormal Copula Networks
text: Stratified two-phase copula network modeling high-dimensional dependence.

title: Stratified Nonparanormal Copula Networks
text: Stratified workflow (RunCopulaPipeline): nonparanormal graphical lasso networks per stratum Two-phase factor-vine (RunFactorVinePipeline): large-sample factor copula prior + small-sample graphical/vine update

title: Stratified Nonparanormal Copula Networks

Ignored quantileMatrix supplied. quantileMatrix Optional pre-computed normal-score matrix (n x p).

what: Prepare data and strata for copula modeling (Step 0) — PrepareCopulaData
title: Prepare data and strata for copula modeling (Step 0) — PrepareCopulaData
text: Validates column roles, resolves node variables, builds named strata declarative recipes. User supplies clean data frame; imputation performed.

title: Prepare data and strata for copula modeling (Step 0) — PrepareCopulaData
code: PrepareCopulaData(   data,   idCols = character(0),   strataCols = character(0),   nodeCols = NULL,   excludeCols = character(0),   strataSpecs = list(all = list()),   outDir = NULL )

title: Prepare data and strata for copula modeling (Step 0) — PrepareCopulaData
text: data Clean input data frame. idCols Character vector identifier columns (excluded model). strataCols Character vector exogenous stratification columns (excluded model). nodeCols Character vector endogenous node columns. NULL, numeric columns idCols, strataCols, excludeCols used. excludeCols Additional columns exclude model. strataSpecs Named list stratum recipes passed BuildStrata(). recipe may include mutate, filter, group_by, stratumCol, nameSep, minN. Keys become prefixes: stratum names "<spec_key>::<stratum_label>". outDir Optional directory save prep.rds.

title: Prepare data and strata for copula modeling (Step 0) — PrepareCopulaData
text: List elements data, idCols, strataCols, nodeCols, strata, meta (per-stratum row counts).

what: Run the full stratified copula pipeline — RunCopulaPipeline
title: Run the full stratified copula pipeline — RunCopulaPipeline
text: Convenience wrapper runs prepare, fit, plot, optional comparisons. step writes RDS checkpoints outDir provided.

title: Run the full stratified copula pipeline — RunCopulaPipeline
code: RunCopulaPipeline(   data,   idCols = character(0),   strataCols = character(0),   nodeCols = NULL,   excludeCols = character(0),   strataSpecs,   comparePairs = list(),   outDir = "checkpoints/copula_run",   method = c("stars", "ebic"),   nlambda = 40,   starsThresh = 0.1,   minN = 10,   includeFull = FALSE,   plotDiagnostics = TRUE,   nodeGroups = NULL,   width = 10,   height = 10,   dpi = 150,   comparisonWidth = 16,   comparisonHeight = 11,   comparisonDpi = 150,   ... )

title: Run the full stratified copula pipeline — RunCopulaPipeline
text: data Clean input data frame. idCols Identifier columns. strataCols Exogenous stratification columns. nodeCols Node columns (NULL = auto-detect numeric). excludeCols Columns exclude modeling. strataSpecs Named list stratum recipes PrepareCopulaData(). comparePairs Optional list length-2 character vectors naming strata compare. outDir Output directory checkpoints figures. method Lambda selection method. nlambda Number lambda values. starsThresh StARS threshold. minN Minimum observations per stratum. includeFull Fit unstratified baseline. plotDiagnostics TRUE, save per-stratum diagnostic plots. nodeGroups Optional node group mapping plots. width Save width inches stratum diagnostic plots. height Save height inches stratum diagnostic plots. dpi Save resolution stratum diagnostic PNG files. comparisonWidth Save width inches comparison plots. comparisonHeight Save height inches comparison plots. comparisonDpi Save resolution comparison PNG files. ... Additional arguments passed PlotStratumDiagnostics().

title: Run the full stratified copula pipeline — RunCopulaPipeline
text: List preparedData, fitResults, plotArtifacts, comparisons.

what: Run the full two-phase factor-vine copula pipeline — RunFactorVinePipeline
title: Run the full two-phase factor-vine copula pipeline — RunFactorVinePipeline
text: Phase 1 fits factor copula prior large reference cohort; Phase 2 updates graphical /vine models small sample; optional consistency testing via simulation /Bayesian updating.

title: Run the full two-phase factor-vine copula pipeline — RunFactorVinePipeline
code: RunFactorVinePipeline(   priorData,   updateData,   nodeCols,   nFactors = 1L,   linkingCopula = "bvn",   nQuad = 25L,   phase2Method = c("graphical", "vine", "both"),   testMethod = c("simulation", "bayes", "both", "none"),   nRep = 500L,   nlambda = 40,   glassoMethod = c("stars", "ebic"),   starsThresh = 0.1,   outDir = NULL,   seed = NULL )

title: Run the full two-phase factor-vine copula pipeline — RunFactorVinePipeline
text: priorData Large reference data frame (N x variables). updateData Small update data frame (n x variables). nodeCols Character vector node column names. nFactors Number latent factors Phase 1 (1 2). linkingCopula Linking copula family per variable (Phase 1). nQuad Quadrature points FactorCopula integration. phase2Method One "graphical", "vine", "". testMethod One "simulation", "bayes", "", "none". nRep Simulation replicates TestPriorConsistency(). nlambda Glasso path length graphical update. glassoMethod Lambda selection graphical update. starsThresh StARS threshold. outDir Optional directory RDS checkpoints. seed Optional random seed simulation test.

title: Run the full two-phase factor-vine copula pipeline — RunFactorVinePipeline
text: List priorFit, updateFit, comparison, consistencyTest, meta.

what: Test whether update data are consistent with the Phase 1 factor prior — TestPriorConsistency
title: Test whether update data are consistent with the Phase 1 factor prior — TestPriorConsistency
text: Simulation-based goodness--fit: compares pairwise Kendall tau statistic real update sample null distribution prior replicates.

title: Test whether update data are consistent with the Phase 1 factor prior — TestPriorConsistency
code: TestPriorConsistency(   priorFit,   updateData,   nRep = 500L,   statistic = c("pairwiseTau"),   seed = NULL )

title: Test whether update data are consistent with the Phase 1 factor prior — TestPriorConsistency
text: priorFit Output FitFactorCopulaPrior(). updateData Data frame node columns update cohort. nRep Number simulation replicates (default 500). statistic Test statistic: "pairwiseTau" (default). seed Optional random seed reproducibility.

title: Test whether update data are consistent with the Phase 1 factor prior — TestPriorConsistency
text: List obsStat, pValue, nullDistribution, nRep.
